nasb.text: You say (but they are only empty words), ‘I have counsel and strength for the war.’ Now on whom do you rely, that you have rebelled against me?

esv.text: Do you think that mere words are strategy and power for war? In whom do you now trust, that you have rebelled against me?

cnv.text: 你說有作戰的智謀和能力，只是嘴上空言，現在你倚賴誰才背叛我呢？

ccb.text: 你所谓的战略和军力不过是空话。你究竟倚靠谁，竟敢背叛我？
